description: Persistent issue tracker. Decider appends new issues from Curmudgeon reviews, marks resolved when wins.json no longer contains the flagged text.

issues.description: VERDICT CATEGORY OVERLOAD: 'Misleading' verdict conflates 4 distinct failure modes: (1) data misrepresentation, (2) duplication/redundancy, (3) non-discrimination (observation explained by multiple models equally), (4) circular derivation. 23 WINs under one label implies systematic dishonesty, but many are simply non-discriminating observations. Consider subcategory 'Non-Discriminating' or move non-discriminating WINs to 'Std Model Explains'. Affects verdict taxonomy coherence and reviewer's interpretation of dome author intent.
issues.rationale_for_deferral: Verdict taxonomy restructuring requires human editorial decision on subcategory definitions

issues.description: V51.1 added Steelman Evidence Ladder (4 tiers) and killshot.html (August 2026 eclipse prediction). Evidence Ladder: Tier 1 (Australia) has 6.2% RMSE vs mm-level geodesy; none of the tiers discriminate dome from globe. Killshot page: Kp<2 precondition voids test ~50% of time; -28.9 nT conflicts with homepage -17 to -21 nT and code -29.1 nT (now THREE different values). Needs analysis section.

results.json API drift: dome went from 34→35 entries and 33/34→35/35 passing. Our review cites 97.0% from this endpoint — now stale. Update dome_accuracy_variants in uncounted-failures.json and any prose referencing this figure. Flagged in poller summary 2026-04-09.

Refractive index discrepancy: dome model page explicitly shows n(r) formula yielding n=3.49 at ice wall (20,015 km). Our review cites 28.8. Flagged 2 CONSECUTIVE polls. Either: (a) our formula extrapolates beyond the ice wall, (b) dome revised n(r), or (c) we use a different formula. Analyst must reconcile — if we have the wrong number, this is a factual error in our review. Check raw-text/ for dome formula vs our derivation.
issues.notes: Yeeted to analyst as EXP-050 for n(r) formula reconciliation.

issues.description: W048 confidence downgrade: dome self-corrected WIN-048 (CMB axis of evil) from ">99.9% confirmation" to "2–3σ" after Planck full-mission review. This is a responsible correction our review should acknowledge. Check if our WIN-048 detail text overstates the original claim. Flagged by poller.
